heading: Availability of exchange allowances or proceeds derived from exchange or sale of motor vehicles
label: 2674 Availability of exchange allowances or proceeds derived from exchange or sale of motor vehicles
text: The exchange allowances or proceeds derived from the exchange or sale of passenger motor vehicles in possession of the Foreign Service abroad, in accordance with , shall be available without fiscal year limitation for replacement of an equal number of such vehicles.section 503 of title 40
